title: 强化 Work Item 证据与生命周期原子性

sources.reason: Concurrency and archive lifecycle regression coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: Incorrect lifecycle targeting can archive the wrong evidence or accept unbound summaries.

executionDecision.reason: Existing lifecycle checks and regression tests are ready for verification.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm Summary worktreeDigest binding and atomic active-file creation remain fail-closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Summary worktreeDigest binding is required and missing source binding fails closed.
Finish and archive target selection rejects wrong-year, same-name, and mismatched evidence.
Concurrent ai-start creation is atomic and regression-tested.
The Work Item is archived and committed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Work Item lifecycle operations must bind evidence to the correct worktree and task without guessing archive targets or racing active-file creation.
constraints: Fail closed on ambiguous target selection.
intent.rationale: Digest binding and atomic lifecycle operations preserve auditability under concurrency and recovery.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Summary without source-bound worktreeDigest is rejected.
Wrong-year or same-name archive target is rejected.
Concurrent start does not create duplicate active Work Items.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
